title: BEM-629 runtime proof workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

smoke=scripts/'claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py'
smoke.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import http.client',
'import json',
'import os',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'OUT = Path("governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json")',
'REPORT = Path("governance/reports/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.md")',
'def truth(value):',
'    return bool(str(value or "").strip())',
'def main():',
'    key = os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "")',
'    model = os.environ.get("AUDITOR_MODEL", "") or os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_MODEL", "") or "claude-3-5-haiku-20241022"',
'    result = {"schema_version":"claude_primary_runtime_smoke.v1","provider_checked":True,"primary_provider":"claude_api","has_anthropic_api_key":truth(key),"model":model,"status":"not_run","http_status":None,"claude_runtime_proven":False,"claude_authored_artifact":False,"blocker":None}',
'    if not truth(key):',
'        result["status"] = "missing_secret"',
'        result["blocker"] = {"code":"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_MISSING","message":"Claude runtime smoke cannot run without secret."}',
'    else:',
'        body = json.dumps({"model": model, "max_tokens": 32, "messages": [{"role":"user","content":"Return exactly: CLAUDE_RUNTIME_SMOKE_OK"}]})',
'        headers = {"content-type":"application/json", "x-api-key": key, "anthropic-version":"2023-06-01"}',
'        try:',
'            conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.anthropic.com", timeout=30)',
'            conn.request("POST", "/v1/messages", body=body, headers=headers)',
'            resp = conn.getresponse()',
'            raw = resp.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")',
'            result["http_status"] = resp.status',
'            if resp.status == 200:',
'                data = json.loads(raw)',
'                texts = []',
'                for item in data.get("content", []):',
'                    if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get("type") == "text":',
'                        texts.append(str(item.get("text", "")))',
'                text = " ".join(texts).strip()',
'                result["claude_text_sha256"] = __import__("hashlib").sha256(text.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()',
'                result["claude_text_preview"] = text[:80]',
'                result["claude_runtime_proven"] = "CLAUDE_RUNTIME_SMOKE_OK" in text',
'                result["claude_authored_artifact"] = result["claude_runtime_proven"]',
'                result["status"] = "runtime_proven" if result["claude_runtime_proven"] else "runtime_response_unexpected"',
'                result["blocker"] = None if result["claude_runtime_proven"] else {"code":"CLAUDE_RESPONSE_UNEXPECTED","message":"Claude returned 200 but did not return expected marker."}',
'            else:',
'                result["status"] = "http_not_ok"',
'                result["blocker"] = {"code":"CLAUDE_HTTP_NOT_OK","http_status":resp.status,"body_preview":raw[:300]}',
'        except:',
'            result["status"] = "runtime_error"',
'            result["blocker"] = {"code":"CLAUDE_RUNTIME_SMOKE_ERROR","message":"Runtime smoke raised an error."}',
'    OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    OUT.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    REPORT.write_text("# Claude Primary Runtime Smoke Result" + SEP + SEP + "Status: " + str(result.get("status")) + SEP + "Runtime proven: " + str(result.get("claude_runtime_proven")) + SEP + "HTTP status: " + str(result.get("http_status")) + SEP + "Blocker: " + ("null" if result.get("blocker") is None else json.dumps(result.get("blocker"), ensure_ascii=False)) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    print(json.dumps({"status": result.get("status"), "runtime_proven": result.get("claude_runtime_proven")}, ensure_ascii=False))',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    main()'
])+sep)

smoke_wf=wfs/'claude-primary-runtime-smoke.yml'
smoke_wf.write_text('''name: Claude Primary Runtime Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.trigger'
      - 'scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-primary-runtime-smoke.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-primary-runtime-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-primary-runtime-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check Claude runtime smoke
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py

      - name: Run Claude runtime smoke
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          AUDITOR_MODEL: ${{ secrets.AUDITOR_MODEL }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py

      - name: Commit Claude runtime smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json governance/reports/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-629 Claude primary runtime smoke result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

verifier=scripts/'verify_curator_hourly_delivery.py'
verifier.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'STATE = Path("governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json")',
'OUT = Path("governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json")',
'REPORT = Path("governance/reports/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.md")',
'def load_json(path):',
'    if not path.exists():',
'        return {}',
'    try:',
'        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'    except:',
'        return {}',
'data = load_json(STATE)',
'delivery = data.get("telegram_delivery")',
'ok = delivery == "sent"',
'result = {"schema_version":"curator_hourly_delivery_verification.v1","checked":True,"telegram_delivery":delivery,"delivery_confirmed":ok,"status":"pass" if ok else "not_confirmed","blocker":None if ok else {"code":"TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_NOT_CONFIRMED","delivery":delivery}}',
'OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'OUT.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'REPORT.write_text("# Curator Hourly Delivery Verification" + SEP + SEP + "Status: " + result["status"] + SEP + "Telegram delivery: " + str(delivery) + SEP + "Blocker: " + ("null" if result.get("blocker") is None else json.dumps(result.get("blocker"), ensure_ascii=False)) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))'
])+sep)

verify_wf=wfs/'curator-hourly-delivery-verification.yml'
verify_wf.write_text('''name: Curator Hourly Delivery Verification

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'
      - 'scripts/verify_curator_hourly_delivery.py'
      - '.github/workflows/curator-hourly-delivery-verification.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: curator-hourly-delivery-verification
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  verify-curator-hourly-delivery:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check delivery verifier
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify_curator_hourly_delivery.py

      - name: Verify delivery
        run: python3 scripts/verify_curator_hourly_delivery.py

      - name: Commit delivery verification
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json governance/reports/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-629 curator hourly delivery verification"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

# Triggers for both live checks.
(triggers/'claude_primary_runtime_smoke.trigger').write_text('BEM-629 trigger Claude runtime smoke 2026-05-18 | 07:29 (UTC+3)'+sep)
(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger').write_text('BEM-629 trigger curator hourly report for delivery verification 2026-05-18 | 07:29 (UTC+3)'+sep)

protocol=protocols/'RUNTIME_PROOF_AND_DELIVERY_VERIFICATION.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-629 | Runtime Proof And Delivery Verification'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:29 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Runtime proof'+sep+'Claude primary can be selected only after `governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json` shows `claude_runtime_proven=true`.'+sep+sep+'## Delivery proof'+sep+'Hourly Telegram delivery can be PASS only after `governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json` shows `delivery_confirmed=true`.'+sep)

state={'schema_version':'runtime_proof_workflows.v1','bem':'BEM-629','status':'workflows_created_and_triggered','claude_smoke_workflow':str(smoke_wf),'delivery_verification_workflow':str(verify_wf),'triggers':['governance/triggers/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.trigger','governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger'],'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:29 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem629_claude_runtime_and_delivery_proof_workflows.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem629_claude_runtime_and_delivery_proof_workflows.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-629 | Claude Runtime And Delivery Proof Workflows | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:29 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Created workflows and scripts for Claude runtime proof and Telegram delivery verification. Both were triggered through marker files.'+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem629_claude_runtime_and_delivery_proof_workflows','cycle_id':'bem629-claude-runtime-and-delivery-proof-workflows','source':'gpt_executor','status':'workflows_created_and_triggered','state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:29 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem629_claude_runtime_and_delivery_proof_workflows']={'status':'workflows_created_and_triggered','state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':None}
contour_state['runtime_proof_and_delivery_verification']='triggered'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:29 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem629_claude_runtime_and_delivery_proof_workflows.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-629 PASS: Claude runtime proof and delivery verification workflows created and triggered.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(smoke),str(smoke_wf),str(verifier),str(verify_wf),str(triggers/'claude_primary_runtime_smoke.trigger'),str(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger'),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created and triggered Claude runtime smoke and curator hourly delivery verification workflows')
"""
No issue comments.
